utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Now check the final package:
1. destination – fully specified (city and country) ✅
2. travel_dates – fully specified with start and end dates ✅
3. transportation – includes detailed flight info and cost ✅
4. accommodation – includes hotel name, rating, cost, amenities, etc. ✅
5. activities – includes name, type, location, dates, duration, price, operator ✅
6. additional_services – included but missing cost; only description and status provided ❌ (not fully specified because the format requires costs)
7. total_budget – total price, currency, and breakdown provided ✅
Therefore, 6 out of 7 items are fully covered with all required details.
